name: Customer Relationship Management
description: Contact management, deal tracking, sales pipelines, and activity logging

terminology.contact: A person or lead with name, company, role, and communication details
terminology.deal: A sales opportunity with monetary value, pipeline stage, probability, and expected close date
terminology.pipeline: A sequence of stages a deal moves through (e.g., Lead → Qualified → Proposal → Negotiation → Won/Lost)
terminology.activity: An interaction logged against a contact or deal — types: call, email, meeting, note, task
terminology.lead: A new contact who has shown initial interest but hasn't been qualified yet

common_queries: What deals are closing this month?
Show me all contacts from Acme Corp
Which deals have been stuck in the same stage for over 2 weeks?
Who are my top 10 contacts by deal value?
What's our win rate this quarter?

example_interactions.user: Log a call with Sarah at TechCorp
example_interactions.assistant: I'll log a call activity for Sarah Johnson at TechCorp. What was discussed? I'll add it to her contact timeline and link it to any open deals.

example_interactions.user: Move the Acme deal to negotiation stage
example_interactions.assistant: Moving 'Acme Corp - Enterprise License' ($150,000) from Proposal to Negotiation. Probability updated to 60%. Expected close date is April 15. Want me to schedule a follow-up activity?

example_interactions.user: Show me deals closing this week
example_interactions.assistant:
You have 3 deals with expected close dates this week:
1. TechStart SaaS ($12k) - Won stage, 90% probability
2. DataFlow Annual ($45k) - Negotiation, 70% probability
3. CloudSync Pilot ($8k) - Proposal, 40% probability
Total potential: $65,000
